buildings.name: Linear
buildings.description: Let agents triage issues, inspect project state, and prepare Linear updates through an MCP or helper command.

access.label: Linear connector
access.detail: Requires a Linear MCP, OAuth connector, or API token configured where the agent runs. BuildingHub only records the setup path.

capabilities.name: linear
capabilities.detail: Preferred path for issue and project access.

steps.title: Connect Linear
steps.detail: Authorize the MCP or provide an API key to the agent environment.

steps.title: Set team boundaries
steps.detail: Document which Linear teams, projects, and update actions are allowed.

steps.title: Install the building
steps.detail: Add Linear to Agent Town once access has been reviewed.

buildings.name: RunPod
buildings.description: Track GPU pod setup for agents that launch, monitor, or use RunPod jobs through a connector or helper.

access.label: RunPod API or CLI
access.detail: Requires RUNPOD_API_KEY or a reviewed helper command where the agent runs. BuildingHub does not run pod lifecycle code itself.

capabilities.name: RUNPOD_API_KEY
capabilities.detail: Required for API-backed pod and endpoint operations.

capabilities.name: runpod
capabilities.detail: Optional local CLI wrapper for reviewed workflows.

variables.label: Budget guardrail
variables.value: max pod type, region, and run duration

steps.title: Add credentials
steps.detail: Expose RUNPOD_API_KEY only to agents allowed to spend compute.

steps.title: Write budget limits
steps.detail: Capture allowed GPU classes, max runtime, and teardown expectations.

steps.title: Install the building
steps.detail: Add RunPod to Agent Town after guardrails are documented.

buildings.name: Supabase
buildings.description: Give agents a visible home for Supabase project setup, migrations, logs, and database access instructions.

access.label: Supabase CLI or MCP
access.detail: Requires Supabase CLI authentication, a provider MCP, or scoped database credentials where the agent runs.

capabilities.name: supabase
capabilities.detail: Local CLI for migrations, branches, and project inspection.

variables.label: Project ref
variables.value: Supabase project ref or local config

variables.label: Access scope
variables.value: CLI login, MCP, or scoped DB URL

steps.title: Choose access path
steps.detail: Use Supabase CLI, MCP, or scoped database credentials.

steps.title: Document migration policy
steps.detail: Tell agents whether they may apply migrations or only prepare them.

steps.title: Install the building
steps.detail: Add Supabase to Agent Town once project boundaries are clear.
